items.title: 3 Dead in Hantavirus Outbreak Aboard Cruise Ship, W.H.O. Says
items.summary: One case of hantavirus infection has been confirmed in a laboratory, the organization said on Sunday. There are five additional suspected cases.

items.title: What Is Hantavirus, Which Is Linked to the Deaths of 3 People Aboard a Cruise Ship?
items.summary: Three people aboard a cruise ship sailing the Atlantic Ocean have died from what health officials suspect were hantavirus infections.
